headline: Chamara Samarawickrama wins Most Popular Teledrama Producer of the Year

content.text: Chamara Samarawickrama and the award record

Chamara Samarawickrama is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Most Popular Teledrama Producer of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Chamara Samarawickrama, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

IMDb identifies Chamara Samarawickrama as a producer known for Paara Dige, Nadagamkarayo, and Agni Piyapath. The GBE archive records his award as Most Popular Teledrama Producer of the Year. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
